info.name: Asana Custom Fields API
info.description:
The Asana Custom Fields API allows developers to create and manage custom fields within Asana. Custom fields provide extra information on tasks, projects, and portfolios with types including text, number, enum, multi_enum, date, and people.

Contact Support:
 Name: Asana Support

variable.description: (Required) Globally unique identifier for the custom field.

request.description: Returns the complete definition of a custom field.

response.name: Successfully retrieved the complete definition of a custom field.
